The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\Users\\andre\\Documents\\Serverless-.serviceRawFile:
service: serverless-java-products-api

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: java21
  region: us-east-1
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}

  memorySize: 1024
  timeout: 20

  environment:
    PRODUCTS_TABLE: ${self:service}-${self:provider.stage}-products
    MAIN_CLASS: com.andres.serverless_java_products_api.ServerlessJavaProductsApiApplication

  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:DeleteItem
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${self:provider.region}:*:table/${self:provider.environment.PRODUCTS_TABLE}

package:
  artifact: target/serverless-java-products-api-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar

functions:
  createProduct:
    handler: org.springframework.cloud.function.adapter.aws.FunctionInvoker

    events:
      - http:
          path: products
          method: post

    environment:
      SPRING_CLOUD_FUNCTION_DEFINITION: createProduct


  deleteProduct:
    handler: org.springframework.cloud.function.adapter.aws.FunctionInvoker

    events:
      - http:
          path: products/{id}
          method: delete

    environment:
      SPRING_CLOUD_FUNCTION_DEFINITION: delete

  getProduct:
    handler: org.springframework.cloud.function.adapter.aws.FunctionInvoker

    events:
      - http:
          path: products/{id}
          method: get

    environment:
      SPRING_CLOUD_FUNCTION_DEFINITION: getProduct

  listProduct:
    handler: org.springframework.cloud.function.adapter.aws.FunctionInvoker

    events:
      - http:
          path: products
          method: get

    environment:
      SPRING_CLOUD_FUNCTION_DEFINITION: getAllProducts

  updateProduct:
    handler: org.springframework.cloud.function.adapter.aws.FunctionInvoker

    events:
      - http:
          path: products/{id}
          method: patch

    environment:
      SPRING_CLOUD_FUNCTION_DEFINITION: updateProduct


resources:
  Resources:
    ProductsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table

      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:provider.environment.PRODUCTS_TABLE}

        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST

        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: id
            AttributeType: S

        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: id
            KeyType: HASH
